title: Alaba Zintzoa
overview: The story of Susana, a young woman who works as a house cleaner. Susana's life is anything but easy; on the contrary, it is full of problems. The constant work and complications that Susana has to face almost daily mean that she urgently needs a break. So when she sees that her employers' house is empty because they have gone on vacation, Susana sees her chance: she moves in for a while to enjoy the luxuries of the rich, so far removed from her daily life.
